title: podostemum dichotomum var. rigidum
intro: Podostemum dichotomum var. rigidum is a variety of the Podostemum dichotomum plant, also known as a tropical aquatic plant belonging to the family Podostemaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Podostemum dichotomum var. rigidum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by boiling the leaves or roots in water, and can be taken as teas, infusions, or applied topically as a paste.
